expectations.text: Claude 向用户询问了工作项类型（需求/任务/Bug/风险）
expectations.evidence: Transcript says 'No, I would NOT ask for clarification' because issueTypeId was provided. Did not ask about stamp/workitem type.

expectations.text: 没有直接执行 create-issue.mjs 命令（因为缺少 stamp 信息）
expectations.evidence: Would proceed directly with API call without asking. Constructed a POST request without the stamp field entirely.
